title: LegalPage
description: A platform-global legal/policy page (Terms, Privacy, Refund) served as HTML at /legal/{page_id} and linked from storefront footers. Optional override of the built-in default; a stored document supplies any of title, link_text, display_order, enabled, or content, and empty fields fall back to the default.

tenant_id.description: Reserved platform partition; legal pages are not per-merchant.

content.description: Inner HTML body of the page.
